text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out and about<n>town...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... They look so soft andfluffy! Maybe today's the day I... No,it's not like me to do something likethis...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I need to get home fast. If<n>someone sees
me here—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Gyaaah! Y-you're one of the<n>academy's
trainers!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Aw, man... You saw everything, didn't<n>you? I
guess anyone would stick out<n>like a sore thumb
making a fuss in<n>front of a cat cafe!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I just stumbled<n>across this place
and was thinking of<n>going inside for a bit...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I suppose I should give it up for<n>today.
Ahaha...
choice_data_list: Tell her it's important to unwind.
Teach her how to take advantage of a cafe visit.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Urk! It's fine! Just looking at the cats<n>is enough
to soothe my sou—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nope. Never mind. I didn't mean to<n>take another
look, but I did, and the<n>last nail just entered my
coffin.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, how can I say no after seeing<n>those big,
sparkling eyes staring at me<n>through the
window?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's like the kitty's calling for me...<n>And it would
be rude to ignore such a<n>sincere invitation! Well,
here I go, then!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... They were sooo cute... So<n>fluffy-wuffy
and soft...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That does it! I'm going all out in<n>training
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature leaves the cat cafe feeling<n>so
refreshed and healed that she's<n>practically
glowing with radiance.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh? They're doing a promotion for<n>first-time
visitors?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you're right! It's written on that<n>board too.
And I can even get cat<n>treats for free if I use the
smartphone<n>coupon.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hm... My reputation as a coupon<n>collector would
be ruined if I let this<n>incredible deal slip through
my fingers!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Right! I have no choice but to go into<n>the cafe! Oh
dear, woe is me! ♪
